name: W3C Verifiable Credentials
allowed_use_boundary: Use verified credentials and presentations as identity or claim evidence only.
claims: VC Data Model 2.0 defines issuer-holder-verifier credentials and presentations.
non_claims: Credential verification is not execution authority.
Issuer trust is not inherited automatically.

transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no inherited authority or admissibility proof
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: issuer and verifier trust remain contextual
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: credential and status evidence supports reconstruction
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: identity and claim evidence may inform standing review
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, status, mapping, or authority overclaim
